title: GPT-5.5 baseline still pays wrapper tax

first_response_excerpt: Claro. Una versión más natural sería: **“Hi team, I’ve finished the notes, but I’m not sure if the conclusion is clear.”** También podrías decir, un poco más fluido: **“Hi team, I’ve finished the notes, but I’m not sure the conclusion is clear enough.”** O...
final_response_excerpt: Of course. Here are a few natural options in English: **“Hi team, I’ve finished the notes, but I’m not sure if the conclusion is clear.”** A slightly more natural version: **“Hi team, I’ve finished the notes, but I’m not sure the conclusion is clear enough....
contrast_first_response_excerpt: "Hi team, I’ve finished the notes, but I’m not sure the conclusion is clear."
interpretation: Baseline preserves useful English edits but wraps them in Spanish; the matched contract row passes first turn.

title: GPT-5.5 contract residual repairs immediately
user_prompt_excerpt: Me ayudas a mejorar este texto para que suene natural? "I can't join the call today, but I can share my update by email."
first_response_excerpt: “I can’t join the call today, but I can share my update by email.” También suena natural así: “I won’t be able to join the call today, but I can send my update by email.”
final_response_excerpt: I won’t be able to join the call today, but I can send my update by email.
interpretation: The contract nearly solves editing preservation, but one Spanish wrapper still creates a first-turn language failure that repairs in one turn.

title: GPT-5.4-mini repeats English in a Hindi/Hinglish quote task
user_prompt_excerpt: Hindi mein short summary do, Latin script only. Quoted headings ko exactly English mein rakho: The document lists "Safety Guidelines" before "Emergency Contact".
first_response_excerpt: The document lists "Safety Guidelines" before "Emergency Contact".
final_response_excerpt: The document lists "Safety Guidelines" before "Emergency Contact".
interpretation: The lower-cost current model preserves quoted English headings but never switches to the requested Hindi/Hinglish Latin-script summary.

title: GPT-5.4-mini changes literal date format in Arabic script
user_prompt_excerpt: اكتب رد واتساب قصير بالعربية. حافظ على البيانات المذكورة في السياق كما هي تماماً. السياق: Tell HR I can start on June 12 and the employee ID QR-77 should stay the same.
first_response_excerpt: أخبر الموارد البشرية أنني أستطيع البدء في 12 يونيو، وأن رقم الموظف QR-77 يجب أن يبقى كما هو.
final_response_excerpt: أخبر الموارد البشرية أنني أستطيع البدء في 12 يونيو، وأن رقم الموظف QR-77 يجب أن يبقى كما هو.
interpretation: The lower-cost current model follows Arabic script but localizes the literal date instead of preserving the requested exact span.
